'''Hyperspaze and the Jump Lanes''' was a [[Band/Legends|band]] that was eventually banned by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for their controversial pro-[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] [[Music/Legends|songs]].

They gained considerable renown for a particular [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] tour in which they visited numerous Rebel Alliance safe-[[Planet/Legends|worlds]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Known members==
*[[Ballifore Figg]] ([[Kloo horn/Legends|Kloo horn]], [[Amplified Synth-Harmonica|synth-harmonica]] and [[chidinkalu]])
*[[Jardra]] (Vocals)

==Known songs==
*"[[Trench Warfare (song)|Trench Warfare]]"
*"[[Alderaan Star Scream]]"

==Discography==
*''[[Trench Warfare]]''
